ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-05-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jill Piano, specially appearing for attorney Matthew Yu, for Lisa Ann Spinali, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The court indicated its intent to take the matter off calendar. Ms. Piano confirmed that there was no objection. The Court and counsel agreed to set a status hearing on the closure of the estate for September 2, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

The court took the First and Final Report off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matt Yu appeared by zoom for and with Lisa Spinali by zoom.

The court stated that it accepts the petitioner's declaration of due diligence with respect to efforts made to locate Rodney Roberts and Theresa Roberts, and that it dispenses with notice of this petition to those parties only. Mr. Yu stated that there are no objections. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission with the intent to grant and to appoint Lisa Ann Spinali as the administrator with limited authority and with no bond. Status on close of estate is set for August 13, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported
